scripts.dev: concurrently -n SERVER,CLIENT -c blue,green "npm run start:dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w server && npm run lint -w client
scripts.lint:ci: npm run lint:ci -w server && npm run lint -w client
scripts.test: npm run test:api && npm run test:playwright
scripts.build: npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client
